mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_sign WHERE sign_id = #{signId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM activity_sign WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_name = #{userName} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM activity_sign WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM activity_sign t INNER JOIN user t2 ON t2.user_name = t.user_name AND t2.deleted = 0 WHERE t.activity_id = #{activityId} AND t.sign_type = #{signType} AND t.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_sign (activity_id, user_id, sign_time, user_name, show_name, sign_type, leave_reason, phone, company) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{signTime}, #{userName}, #{showName}, #{signType}, #{leaveReason}, #{phone}, #{company})
mapper.update:
UPDATE activity_sign
sign_type = #{signType}, leave_reason = #{leaveReason},
WHERE sign_id = #{signId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity_sign SET deleted = 1 WHERE sign_id = #{signId}
